title: aletris lanuginosa var. khasiana
intro: Aletris lanuginosa var. khasiana, also known as Himalayan unicorn root or Indian unicorn root, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are believed to help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Aletris lanuginosa var. khasiana include its ability to lower fever, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for respiratory infections, skin conditions, and other diseases. Aletris lanuginosa var. khasiana is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
